hypothesis: Augmenting MACE-OMAT-0 with 5,000 MOF-specific out-of-equilibrium fragments sampling linker torsions and metal–ligand coordination distortions will increase the fraction of MOFSimBench structures converging within 1,000 optimization steps by at least 20% and reduce the fraction of 50 ps NpT simulations with |ΔV|>10% by at least 25% relative to augmenting with 5,000 non-MOF inorganic fragments.
